original: Missiles are a common form of defense. Packing self-oxidizing fuel, they can give chase to targets in ways that dumb-fired bullets and streaking lasers cannot. Explosive warheads make them more effective against shielded foes than impact-focused weapons like rail and coil guns, but missiles still lag behind lasers and EM shells when it comes to raw, shield-purging power.
